title: Fragrant Malty Uruguayan Chicken Drumsticks Fried Rice
description: A malty, gooey, and flavorful Uruguayan dish featuring chicken drumsticks and fried rice, cooked to perfection on a tava griddle.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large tava griddle over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken drumsticks and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the griddle and set aside.
Add the diced onion to the griddle and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the griddle and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked rice to the griddle, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice for about 5 minutes, or until it is heated through and starting to brown.
Add the malt syrup, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the griddle and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Return the chicken drumsticks to the griddle and stir-fry until the chicken is coated in the malty sauce.
Serve the fragrant malty Uruguayan chicken drumsticks fried rice hot, garnished with chopped scallions if desired.
